name: Colossus Motives & Tactics
description: Random motives and corresponding tactics for Colossal adversaries.

results.name: Territorial Defense
results.description:
Motive: Territorial Defense
Tactics: Aggressively pushes intruders away from its core territory. Focuses on area-denial attacks.

results.name: Primal Hunger
results.description:
Motive: Primal Hunger
Tactics: Targets the smallest or weakest-looking prey first. Attempts to swallow or restrain victims.

results.name: Ancient Protocol
results.description:
Motive: Ancient Protocol
Tactics: Follows a rigid, predictable pattern of attacks. Prioritizes defensive shell/carapace over offense.

results.name: Corruption Spreading
results.description:
Motive: Corruption Spreading
Tactics: Emits hazardous environmental effects. Targets clusters of enemies with sweeping blows.

results.name: Search for Relics
results.description:
Motive: Search for Relics
Tactics: Focuses on characters carrying magical items. Uses non-lethal displacement to isolate targets.

results.name: Mindless Rampage
results.description:
Motive: Mindless Rampage
Tactics: Attacks the nearest target regardless of threat level. Moves unpredictably, crashing through obstacles.
